stemHtml: Which statement is true for a conditionally unstable layer?

options.a: The environmental lapse rate is always less than 0.65°C/100 m, usually around 0.3°/100 m to 0.5°C/100 m.
options.b: The environmental lapse rate is between the dry and the saturated adiabatic lapse rate.
options.c: An isothermal layer and an inversion layer are examples of conditionally unstable layers.
options.d: The environmental lapse rate is always higher than 3°C/1 000 ft, usually around 6°C/1 000 ft.
